히브리서 3:1.content: Therefore, holy brothers, partakers of a heavenly calling, consider the Apostle and High Priest of our confession: Jesus,

히브리서 3:2.content: who was faithful to him who appointed him, as also Moses was in all his house.

히브리서 3:3.content: For he has been counted worthy of more glory than Moses, because he who built the house has more honor than the house.

히브리서 3:4.content: For every house is built by someone; but he who built all things is God.

히브리서 3:5.content: Moses indeed was faithful in all his house as a servant, for a testimony of those things which were afterward to be spoken,

히브리서 3:6.content: but Christ is faithful as a Son over his house. We are his house, if we hold fast our confidence and the glorying of our hope firm to the end.

히브리서 3:7.content: Therefore, even as the Holy Spirit says, “Today if you will hear his voice,

히브리서 3:8.content: don’t harden your hearts, as in the rebellion, like as in the day of the trial in the wilderness,

히브리서 3:9.content: where your fathers tested me and tried me, and saw my deeds for forty years.

히브리서 3:10.content: Therefore I was displeased with that generation, and said, ‘They always err in their heart, but they didn’t know my ways.’

히브리서 3:11.content: As I swore in my wrath, ‘They will not enter into my rest.’ ”

히브리서 3:12.content: Beware, brothers, lest perhaps there might be in any one of you an evil heart of unbelief, in falling away from the living God;

히브리서 3:13.content: but exhort one another day by day, so long as it is called “today”, lest any one of you be hardened by the deceitfulness of sin.

히브리서 3:14.content: For we have become partakers of Christ, if we hold the beginning of our confidence firm to the end,

히브리서 3:15.content: while it is said, “Today if you will hear his voice, don’t harden your hearts, as in the rebellion.”

히브리서 3:16.content: For who, when they heard, rebelled? Wasn’t it all those who came out of Egypt led by Moses?

히브리서 3:17.content: With whom was he displeased forty years? Wasn’t it with those who sinned, whose bodies fell in the wilderness?

히브리서 3:18.content: To whom did he swear that they wouldn’t enter into his rest, but to those who were disobedient?

히브리서 3:19.content: We see that they weren’t able to enter in because of unbelief.
